coreTruthSet.description: Campti is reframed as a strategic frontier hub for brokered movement, trade, and influence consolidation.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Campti ... strategic frontier hub ... where frontier power consolidates.

coreTruthSet.description: Interpreter function is modeled as a central power position controlling conflict prevention, trade continuity, and multi-group trust.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: This is a power position, not a marginal one.

coreTruthSet.description: Louis Grappe is framed as an anchor figure for an interpreter/broker class operating between Native, Spanish, and French systems.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Louis Grappe ... interpreter in Indian affairs ... a cultural intermediary.

coreTruthSet.description: Coincoin-descendant land base and Grappe diplomatic-linguistic networks are framed as intersecting to produce hybrid multi-system power.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: When these intersect ... a hybrid society with power in multiple systems.

coreTruthSet.description: Population architecture explicitly adds an interpreter/broker layer alongside Native, colonial, enslaved/creole, and military layers.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: We now add a fourth population layer: interpreter / broker class.

settingAnchors.name: Campti Interpreter Corridor Node
settingAnchors.description: Upper Natchitoches corridor node positioned for brokered diplomacy, landholding, and intersystem translation work.

continuityConstraints.title: Five-Pillar Timeline Integration
continuityConstraints.text: Story architecture should integrate native world, colonial power shifts, creole lineage, military layer, and broker/interpreter layer as concurrent forces.

continuityConstraints.title: Frontier Survival Through Translation
continuityConstraints.text: In high-friction borderlands, translation and trust brokerage are survival infrastructure for all sides.

openResearchGaps.title: Which archival chain best links Louis Grappe and related broker figures across Spanish, French, and Native records?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to strengthen documentary continuity for interpreter-class claims.

openResearchGaps.title: What are the limits and failure modes of broker-class influence when trust collapses or imperial demands harden?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to avoid over-centralizing intermediary power in later conflict arcs.

openResearchGaps.title: How does Campti’s strategic function change decade-by-decade across trade, diplomacy, and landholding pressures?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed for time-accurate frontier hub portrayal.
